samples.text: All salmon are fish. All fish are animals. Are salmon animals?
Every member of salmon is among fish. Every member of fish is among animals. Does it follow that salmon are animals?
All Atlantic salmon are aquatic vertebrates. All aquatic vertebrates are animals. Are Atlantic salmon animals?
animals include all fish. fish include all salmon. Therefore, are salmon animals?
All salmon are fish. All fish are animals. Someone left the door open earlier. Are salmon animals?
